reviews.author: Vlastimil Babka (SUSE)
reviews.summary: Approved the patch and gave a Reviewed-by tag without raising any issues or concerns.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch series refactors the slab stat code in mm/memcontrol.c to improve maintainability and make it easier to follow. The first patch splits out a new function __obj_cgroup_charge() that handles page charge and remainder calculation, making the surrounding code simpler.
